title: Add tests for verify/commit gating and tx mismatch errors
summary: Add tests to validate sequencing enforcement, tx mismatch handling, and rebuild-stability guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover verify lifecycle ordering: reject verify results before verify.start.
Tests cover commit gating: commit_if_verified fails without successful verify lifecycle.
Tests cover ops_start_task rejection when an unrelated active transaction exists.
Tests cover ops_update_task rejecting mismatched tx_id and succeeding when aligned.
Tests cover event ordering guardrails that prevent rebuild-halting sequences.

steps.description: Identify test locations and existing fixtures for tool sequencing and transaction state handling.
Add tests for verify.start ordering and commit_if_verified gating behavior.
Add tests for ops_start_task and ops_update_task tx_id validation.
Add tests ensuring event ordering prevents rebuild-halting sequences.

notes: Keep tests focused on sequencing and transaction integrity behavior.
Prefer minimal, deterministic fixtures; avoid reliance on external state.
